title: Block RAM inference with negedge clock generates code that can't place
body:
always @(posedge clka)
  begin
     if (wen) mem[addra]]<=dina; 
   end
always @(negedge clka)
   begin
      doutb<=mem[addrb];
   end

This generates a BLIF, but archane-PNR says:
demo.blif:2026: fatal error: unknown formal `RCLKN'

Looking in the BLIF this is -- no surprise -- in the SB_RAM40_4KNR macro.
